//: Phase 3 hard gates. Scripts live in .claude/hooks/ (PowerShell, DEC-20). Invoked via explicit 'pwsh -NoProfile -File' so execution does not depend on the host's default shell or the 'shell' hook field (DEC-24).

PreToolUse.//: Global Bash leg (DEC-35): no-commit-on-main ONLY. Merge/push/branch-delete blocks are subagent-scoped (each role's frontmatter, git-guard -Scope subagent + block-merge) so the orchestrator's approval-gated merge and cleanup paths stay open.

hooks.//: no commit on a red suite — runs the suite only on a commit attempt.

PreToolUse.//: subagents-never-merge (GitHub plugin merge tool, DEC-7). Global block; the orchestrator merges via 'gh pr merge' in Bash (after founder approval), not this tool.
spec-freeze: design/ is frozen during implementation. Comment this entry out to run a spec-authoring pass (see docs/agentic-build.md).
